headline: Crown Castle Q2 AFFO Beats Estimates on Lower Interest Expense
summary: CCI's Q2 AFFO beat reflects lower interest expense, while asset sales, debt repayment and land investments reshape its outlook.

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Prologis, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Prologis (NYSE:PLD) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $146 to $150.

raw.headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Prologis, Raises Price Target to $150
raw.summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Prologis (NYSE:PLD) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $146 to $150.

headline: SEGRO jumps after board agrees to recommend Prologis deal
summary: SEGRO PLC (LSE:SGRO) shares jumped 7% to 957p in early trading on Thursday after the board of the warehouse developer said it "would be minded" to recommend the "best and final" takeover proposal made by Prologis Inc (NYSE:PLD), after the US logistics property group raised its offer and...
